free_text: Typed attachment grid (transposed layout, footer 'MS M R Schedule A 12.31.16'): one asset per column, three asset columns on this page; selections are black-filled cells. EIF row has a checkmark for all three columns. Ticker row blank for all three. For all three assets the black band covers both 'Other Type of Income' (Type of Income block) and 'A: None' (Amount of Income: Current Year block). Header: 'Name: Rohit Khanna', 'Page ___ of ___' (blank).

uncertainties.read: grey speckled band across the 'A: None' row of the Preceding Year block in all three columns
uncertainties.note: appears to be template shading/scan artifact rather than a selection; each column has exactly one solid black mark in that block (H/G/I respectively), which was transcribed
